# GitHub Configuration

Configuration files for GitHub Actions, Dependabot, and other GitHub-specific features.

## Directory Index

- [`ISSUE_TEMPLATE/`](ISSUE_TEMPLATE/) - GitHub issue forms for bug reports, feature requests, tasks, and sub-issues.
- [`workflows/`](workflows/) - GitHub Actions workflows.
- [`CODEOWNERS`](CODEOWNERS) - Defines code owners for pull request reviews.
- [`dependabot.yml`](dependabot.yml) - Configuration for automated dependency updates.
